title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: A tutorial on building a real-world multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph. The system consists of four specialized agents (Flight, Hotel, Itinerary, and Final Response) that integrate APIs, memory, and a large language model to perform coordinated planning tasks.
